problem_text_cn: 1442 测量滑块在倾斜气垫导轨上滑行时的速度和加速度。在调成一定倾斜度的气垫导轨上，用平板挡光片测量滑块自静止开始自由下滑至 50.0 cm 处的速度和滑块下滑时的加速度。[可供仪器和用具] 已调成倾斜并已接通压缩空气的气轨（气轨一侧贴有米尺），滑块，平板挡光片，光电门 2 只，光电计时器，游标卡尺。[要求] (1) 写出实验原理公式。(2) 写出实验设计思路。(3) 列出原始数据表。(4) 用作图法求实验结果。
problem_text_en: 1442 Measure the velocity and acceleration of a slider sliding on an inclined air track. On an air track adjusted to a certain inclination, use a flat light barrier to measure the velocity of the slider when it slides down freely from rest to 50.0 cm and the acceleration of the slider during sliding. [Available instruments and tools] Air track adjusted to be inclined and connected with compressed air (a meter stick is attached to one side of the air track), slider, flat light barrier, 2 photoelectric gates, photoelectric timer, vernier caliper. [Requirements] (1) Write down the experimental principle formula. (2) Write down the experimental design idea. (3) List the original data table. (4) Use the graphing method to find the experimental results.
img_cn: 图1442_1：气垫导轨装置示意图
图1442_2：v²-s 关系数据及逐差法处理结果
img_en: Fig. 1442_1: Schematic diagram of air track device
Fig. 1442_2: v²-s relationship data and results of successive difference method
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】滑块沿光滑斜面匀加速运动，满足$v^2 = v_0^2 + 2as$，加速度$a = g\sin\theta = g\frac{h}{L}$（$h$为垫块高，$L$为导轨两端脚螺丝间距）。挡光板长度$\Delta l$，挡光时间$\Delta t$，平均速度$v = \frac{\Delta l}{\Delta t}$近似为瞬时速度。作$v^2-s$图得直线，斜率$k = 2a$，截距$b$。代入数据：挡光板$\Delta l = 1.000\ \mathrm{cm}$，最小二乘法得$k = 58.32\ \mathrm{cm^2/s^3}$，$b = 1335.4\ \mathrm{cm^2/s^2}$，加速度$a = 29.16\ \mathrm{cm/s^2}$，下滑 50.0 cm 处速度$v = 54.00\ \mathrm{cm/s}$。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】The slider moves with uniform acceleration along the smooth inclined plane, satisfying $v^2 = v_0^2 + 2as$, and the acceleration $a = g\sin\theta = g\frac{h}{L}$ ($h$ is the height of the cushion block, $L$ is the distance between the foot screws at both ends of the track). The length of the light barrier is $\Delta l$, the light blocking time is $\Delta t$, and the average velocity $v = \frac{\Delta l}{\Delta t}$ is approximately the instantaneous velocity. Plotting $v^2-s$ gives a straight line with slope $k = 2a$ and intercept $b$. Substituting data: light barrier $\Delta l = 1.000\ \mathrm{cm}$, least squares method gives $k = 58.32\ \mathrm{cm^2/s^3}$, $b = 1335.4\ \mathrm{cm^2/s^2}$, acceleration $a = 29.16\ \mathrm{cm/s^2}$, velocity at 50.0 cm sliding down $v = 54.00\ \mathrm{cm/s}$.
problem_answer: 加速度：$\boldsymbol{29.16\ \mathrm{cm/s^2}}$；下滑 50.0 cm 处速度：$\boldsymbol{54.00\ \mathrm{cm/s}}$；测量关键：$v^2-s$图求加速度，挡光板测瞬时速度。
